landing.header_tagline: Platform for teaching the Islamic sciences
landing.hero_title: Ahl al-Athar platform for teaching the Islamic sciences
landing.hero_subtitle: Learn Arabic, creed, prophetic biography, Qur’an, and monotheism according to Ahl al-Sunnah wa’l-Jamā‘ah.
landing.card_ar_desc: Learn Arabic from zero to proficiency.
landing.card_aq_desc: Learn the creed of Ahl al-Sunnah wa’l-Jamā‘ah.
landing.card_sir_desc: Learn the life of the Prophet ﷺ and the Companions.
landing.card_taw_desc: Learn the methodology of tawḥīd and sincerity to Allah.
landing.cta_start_sub: Join thousands of students and begin your journey of seeking knowledge.
landing.cta_login_sub: Already have an account? Sign in.
landing.supervisor_heading: Under the supervision of Shaykh Abū Sufyān Khāṭib Dāwūd
landing.supervisor_text: Student of knowledge and teacher of the Islamic sciences on an authentic Salafi methodology based on evidence.
landing.supervisor_shield: Authentic Salafi methodology based on the Book and the Sunnah
landing.feat_lessons_desc: Curricula arranged from basics to advanced.
landing.feat_anytime_desc: Learn from where you are, at the time that suits you.
landing.feat_certs_desc: Receive a certificate of completion for courses.
landing.feat_safe_desc: A safe educational platform free of violations.
landing.footer_heading: Begin your journey of seeking knowledge today

admin_contact.err_firestore_permission: Firestore denied the write. Deploy project rules (firebase deploy --only firestore:rules) and ensure your account is admin: users/{uid} has role "admin" or isAdmin true, or a document exists at admins/{uid}.
admin_contact.err_firestore_index: This Firestore query needs an index. Open the link from the error in the browser developer console.
admin_contact.empty_desc: Add your first contact method above.

admin_enrollment_requests.title: Enrollment requests
admin_enrollment_requests.lede: Review student requests to join courses and folders — same flow as the mobile app.
admin_enrollment_requests.folder_accepted: Folder request approved and the student was added as a member.
admin_enrollment_requests.course_reactivate: Request approved and activation updated. The student was already enrolled.
admin_enrollment_requests.course_accepted: Request approved and the student was added to the course.
admin_enrollment_requests.accept_failed: Could not approve the request. Check Firestore rules or indexes.

quiz_video.no_embed_hint: This link cannot be embedded — it will open in the browser.

admin_lesson_quizzes.lede: Create and manage quiz files for a lesson (Firestore path: quiz_files, same as the mobile app).
admin_lesson_quizzes.load_failed: Could not load the lesson or quizzes.
admin_lesson_quizzes.sched_need_dates: When scheduling is enabled, set both start and end date/time.
admin_lesson_quizzes.created_ok: Quiz created. Open “Questions & edit” to add questions.
admin_lesson_quizzes.sched_invalid: Could not save the schedule. Check the dates.
admin_lesson_quizzes.create_failed: Could not create the quiz. Check rules and admin permissions.
admin_lesson_quizzes.delete_confirm_b: and all its questions and student answers?

admin_student_view.title: Student details
admin_student_view.lede: Manage the student’s profile and links (courses, folders, requests) like in the app.

admin_admins.load_failed: Could not load admins. Check Firestore permissions.
admin_admins.title: Admins
admin_admins.lede: Browse and search admins — same idea as the Admins tab in the app, in a web layout.

admin_students.load_failed: Could not load students. Check Firestore permissions.
admin_students.title: Students
admin_students.lede: Student list with search and status filters — same idea as the Students tab in the app.

nav.platform_subtitle: All your tools in one place
nav.contact_admin_sub: Phone, WhatsApp, and links for visitors
nav.settings_sub: Profile and session from the top bar
nav.sidebar_hint: Profile and session from the top bar

home.title: Home
home.subtitle_short: A quick look at activity and numbers.
home.load_partial: Some statistics loaded partially. Check permissions for some collections.
home.load_failed: Could not load some dashboard data. Try refreshing later.
home.lede_admin: Admin dashboard: courses, requests, and posts.
home.lede_student: Student dashboard: my courses, enrollment requests, course catalog, and notifications — like the mobile app.

posts.lede_admin: Write a post and publish it for students. Students only see published posts (same as the app).
posts.lede_student: Announcements and posts published by admins for students.
posts.load_failed: Could not load posts. Check Firestore rules and indexes.
posts.publish_for_students: Publish for students (visible in app and web)

settings.lede: Shortcuts for account and session — profile details and sign-out are also in the top bar.
settings.load_code_failed: Could not load the current admin code; the default will be used.
settings.code_save_failed: Could not save the admin code right now.
settings.admin_security_lede: An admin access code is required when signing in as admin. Default code:
settings.link_contact_public: Contact us — support numbers and channels

notifications.lede: Same notification sync as the mobile app. The top bar count updates when you mark items read.
notifications.send_failed: Could not send. Check the user ID and your permissions.
notifications.recipient_search_ph: Search by name, email, or ID
notifications.hint_students: Will send to all active students.
notifications.hint_admins: Will send to all active admins.
notifications.hint_all: Will send to all active users.

profile.title: Profile
profile.lede: Edit name, phone, and profile photo — matches the Firestore user document and mobile app.
profile.complete_hint: Please complete your profile (name + phone) before continuing.
profile.err_image_type: Choose an image file (PNG or JPEG).
profile.photo_failed: Could not upload photo. Check storage permissions.
profile.phone_required_first: Enter and save your phone number first.
profile.password_failed: Could not set password. Sign in again and retry.
profile.password_hint: After Google sign-in, you can set a password to sign in later with phone + password.

student_mycourses.lede_short: Your courses after enrollment is approved.
student_mycourses.lede: Courses the admin approved you for — matches the “My courses” tab in the mobile app.
student_mycourses.load_failed: Could not load your courses. Check Firestore rules.
student_mycourses.empty_cta: Go to courses and request enrollment
student_mycourses.catalog_paused_title: May not appear in the public catalog

student_myfiles.lede_loading: Folders and explore files — web layout aligned with the app flow.
student_myfiles.lede: Like the app “Files” tab: my folders (MyFolders) plus exploring available folders (public/private) and requesting private access.

student_myfiles.empty_search: No matching folders in your list.
student_myfiles.empty_none: No folders in “My folders” yet. When an admin adds you to a folder, it appears here.

admin_folders.lede: Manage folders (list/search/details) like the “Folders” tab in the app.
admin_folders.load_failed: Could not load folders. Check Firestore permissions.

student_explore.lede: Unified courses and files tab like the app, with a web-friendly layout.
student_explore.load_failed: Could not load explore. Check connection and Firestore permissions.
student_explore.courses_hint: Public courses: direct enroll. Private courses: request to join.
student_explore.files_hint: Public folders: direct join. Private folders: request access.
student_explore.folder_request_failed: Could not send request. Check permissions.

courses.lede_admin: Create and edit courses, manage enrollment requests, and link lessons from the course lessons page.
courses.lede_student: Browse available courses, request access, or go to My courses after approval.
courses.pending_exists: You already have a pending request for this course.
courses.enroll_ok: You were enrolled in the course.
courses.empty_search: No results. Try other words or clear the search.
courses.empty: No courses in the list yet.

student_requests.lede_short: Track enrollment requests — same as “My requests” / courses in the app.
student_requests.lede: Track enrollment requests for courses and folders — same as “My requests” in the app.
student_requests.load_failed: Could not load your requests. Check connection and Firestore rules.

student_course_view.lede_preview: Student UI preview: lessons as shown without enrollment checks (admin only).
student_course_view.lede_student: Course details and lesson list with locks and progress — like the mobile app.
student_course_view.preview_banner_body: The links below are what a student sees.
student_course_view.not_enrolled: You are not enrolled. Request access from Courses; after approval, lessons appear here.
student_course_view.empty_lessons: No lessons for this course yet.
student_course_view.mandatory_quiz_hint: Includes a mandatory quiz (for the next lesson)

student_lesson.load_failed: Could not load the lesson (permissions or missing lesson).
student_lesson.not_enrolled: You are not allowed to view lessons in this course.
student_lesson.not_found: The lesson is missing or was removed.
student_lesson.mandatory_quiz_badge_title: Required to unlock the next lesson

student_lesson.attachments_empty: No direct attachments for this lesson.
student_lesson.comment_send_failed: Could not post comment. Check your connection.
student_lesson.quizzes_empty: No quizzes for this lesson yet.

student_quiz.intro_tabs_hint: Use the Questions tab to answer, and Results for grading summary and your answers after you submit.

student_quiz.not_enrolled: You are not enrolled in this course.

student_quiz.lede_preview: Student quiz preview: read-only (admins cannot submit from preview).

student_quiz.preview_banner_rest: Answers are for visual review only.
student_quiz.no_questions_body: No questions are configured for this quiz yet. Please contact the admin, then try again.
student_quiz.finalized_questions_hint: Submission is closed — your answers are shown below. For scores and notes, open the Results tab.
student_quiz.timer_expired_body: You can no longer edit answers. If this is wrong, contact the admin.
student_quiz.timer_starts_on_questions: The timer starts when you open the Questions tab.

student_folder.lede: Folder files for students — web layout like the app.

student_folder.download_fallback_tab: Download failed; opened link in a new tab.

lesson_content.video_fallback_hint: Open the link in the browser if it does not embed.
lesson_content.pdf_hint: If preview fails, use “Open in new tab”.
